author: design-phase-2a-accessibility-md-d5c6
content: Decision: Defined A11yNode as a concrete tree struct rather than a trait, because the a11y crate cannot depend on vitreous_widgets (circular dependency). The widgets crate will construct A11yNode trees from its Node tree and pass them to generate_accesskit_tree(). This keeps the dependency graph clean while providing a simple, testable interface.
